stemHtml: For the aeroplane for which the taxiway is intended, the taxiway designer assumes that on a taxiway curve the…

options.a: width of the taxiway is decreased on the inner curve.
options.b: cockpit of the aeroplane will remain over the taxiway centre-line markings.
options.c: width of the taxiway is increased on the outer curve.
options.d: pilot will oversteer and the cockpit will NOT follow the centre-line markings.
